---
title: "daggleR"
---

daggleR is the companion R package for daggle. It provides R functions for working with daggle DAGs, runs, and outputs.

Install from GitHub:

```r
pak::pak("cynkra/daggleR")
```

## Three categories

### In-step helpers

These run inside R steps executed by daggle. They use environment variables and stdout markers to communicate with the daggle runtime. Base R only -- no network, no daggle binary needed.

```r
library(daggleR)

# Emit an output that downstream steps can read
output("row_count", nrow(data))

# Read an output from an upstream step
path <- get_output("fetch", "output_path")

# Get run metadata
run_id()
dag_name()
run_dir()
```

See [In-Step Helpers](in-step.qmd) for the full reference.

### API wrappers

These talk to the `daggle serve --port` REST API using httr2. Use them from interactive R sessions, Shiny apps, or any R process that needs to control daggle remotely.

```r
library(daggleR)

# List DAGs as a data.frame
list_dags(base_url = "http://localhost:8787")

# Trigger a run and get the run_id
result <- trigger("etl-daily", params = list(date = "2025-01-15"))
result$run_id

# Check run status
get_run("etl-daily", result$run_id)
```

See [API Wrappers](api-wrappers.qmd) for the full reference.

### Approval helpers

Approve or reject steps that are waiting for manual approval, via the REST API:

```r
library(daggleR)

approve("etl-daily", run_id = "latest", step_id = "load")
reject("etl-daily", run_id = "latest", step_id = "load")
```

These are included in the API wrappers reference.
